description_long: This is a vintage biplane with a green and blue fuselage, featuring two sets of straight, wooden-colored wings stacked one above the other. The wings are supported by black struts and wires, and each wing displays a black cross insignia, reminiscent of early 20th-century military aircraft. The nose houses a large, wooden propeller and a visible engine, while the cockpit is open and situated just behind the upper wing, with a small windshield. The tail section is blue with a vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, also marked with black crosses. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a tail skid, all fixed and exposed, giving the airplane a classic, historical appearance.
description: A vintage green and blue biplane with wooden wings, black cross insignias, an open cockpit, and a large front propeller.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large wooden propeller, engine detail, and the stacked biplane wings with supporting struts.
description_view_1: Angled top-side view highlighting the open cockpit, wing insignias, and the blue tail section.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full wingspan, both sets of wings, and the cross insignias on the wings and tail.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the fuselage, cockpit position, and the fixed landing gear with tail skid.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two sets of straight, parallel wings stacked vertically; no winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a two-blade wooden propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a tail skid.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open single-seat cockpit located just behind the upper wing with a small windshield.
